name: shikav-sql
description: Shikav [by Kavish Ghumre] - Interactive SQL Learning Platform

scripts.install:all: npm.cmd install && cd client && npm.cmd install
scripts.setup: npm.cmd run install:all && npm.cmd run seed && npm.cmd run build:client
scripts.dev: start cmd /k "node server.js" && start cmd /k "cd client && npm.cmd run dev"
